template.name: Projects Page

div.p: Delivering excellence across industrial, infrastructure, commercial, and engineering projects throughout Saudi Arabia.
With a strong commitment to quality, safety, and innovation, we have successfully delivered a wide range of projects that drive progress and create long-term value for our clients and communities.
Successfully delivered across Saudi Arabia.
Proven experience across diverse sectors.
On schedule. On budget. Every time.
Built with responsibility. Delivered with excellence.
Upgrade and expansion of process units with enhanced efficiency and safety.
Jubail, Saudi Arabia
Upgrade and expansion of process units with enhanced efficiency and safety.
Design, supply, and installation of modular residential camp for workforce housing.
Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
Design, supply, and installation of modular residential camp for workforce housing.
Construction of a state-of-the-art water treatment facility with modern systems.
Dammam, Saudi Arabia
Construction of a state-of-the-art water treatment facility with modern systems.
Mechanical and piping installation for industrial facility improvements.
Yanbu, Saudi Arabia
Mechanical and piping installation for industrial facility improvements.
Premium fit-out works for office spaces with high-quality finishes.
Khobar, Saudi Arabia
Premium fit-out works for office spaces with high-quality finishes.
Roads, utilities, and site development works supporting NEOM infrastructure.
NEOM, Saudi Arabia
Roads, utilities, and site development works supporting NEOM infrastructure.
Design, supply, installation, and testing of electrical substation and systems.
Jeddah, Saudi Arabia
Design, supply, installation, and testing of electrical substation and systems.

div.h5: Temporary Site Offices & Camp Facilities – Qiddiya
div.p: Provision of temporary site offices and camp facilities for project operations.

div.h5: Temporary Site Offices & Camp Facilities – Qiddiya
div.p: Qiddiya, Saudi Arabia
Provision of temporary site offices and camp facilities for project operations.
Partner with PETRORAQ for reliable solutions and lasting results.
